misc: Known for bomb drives despite his advanced age.
Finally made his first hole-in-one on May 24th, 2025, after 20 years of trying.
biography: Harri, affectionately known as "the doctor" among his peers, brings a wealth of experience and a unique blend of power and precision to the greens of Hattula Golf. Despite his advanced age, Harri is renowned for his bomb drives, consistently outperforming players half his age with raw power. His dedication to the sport is undeniable, marked by unwavering persistence and a relentless pursuit of perfection.

A stalwart of the Hector Trophée, Harri's participation in the upcoming Hector Trophée 2026 will mark his seventh appearance in the prestigious tournament. With two Hector Trophée victories already under his belt, Harri has proven himself a formidable competitor in the pairs format. While the coveted Victor Trophy has eluded him thus far, his focus remains steadfast on contributing to his team's success.

Off the course, Harri is known for his calm demeanor and thoughtful approach to the game, traits that have earned him the respect and admiration of his fellow golfers. After 20 years of relentless pursuit, Harri finally celebrated his first hole-in-one on May 24th, 2025, a testament to his enduring commitment and passion for the sport.
